amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 738 in DIY & Tools (See Top 100 in DIY & Tools) 21 in Power Strips

features: ►Multi-Function: This 13A extension lead with total power supply up to 3120W, enables you to power up 6 appliances simultaneously. Ideal for using in home, offices, entertainment centers and other areas where multiple devices need to be connected.

►Surge Protection: Built with high-quality components and enhanced circuitry, anti-thunder protection and surge protection, this power strip is protected against over-voltage, over-current, short-circuiting, overload, offering more safety for household electric appliances and a peaceful mind while charging.

►Safety Guarantee: CE, UKCA, BS1363-2/A approved. We adopt anti-fire material (750℃) and standard copper cord (H05VV-F 3G1.25mm²), high temperature resistant and flame retardant, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers.

►Space-saving Design: The compact and lightweight design with mounting holes on the back make the extension lead able to fix on the wall and 2 metre length cable is long enough to reach your powered devices. Ideal for charging multiple appliances from distance in a large office or room.
►What You Get: ExtraStar 6-port extension lead and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us at any time and we will reply in 24 hours.
description: Product Description Brand: ExtraStar Ports: 6 Way Switches: 6 Voltage: 13A/250V~ Max. Load: 3120W Wall-mounted: Yes Surge Protection: Yes Copper Wire: H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² ExtraStar 6 Way Multi Sockets Power strips Extension Lead with Extension Cable 6 Gang Surge Protected Extension Cords ExtraStar is constantly looking for safe and efficient products for improving user experience and creating a new generation of technology and products that truly meet the needs of hundreds of families. Keep packaging bag away from children. Do not use in wet conditions. Do not exceed total maximum load. Do not wire directly to the mains. Fully extend before use. Key Features Built-in surge protection is heat resistance and power resistance. Anti-thunder protection ensure safety for household electric appliances, offering an extra safety and a peaceful mind while charging. Every socket with 75N safety shutter in it, which equivalent to the force of picking up a 7.5kg object, can prevent children from inserting their fingers and causing electric shock. With anti-fire material (750℃) and standard copper cord (H05VV-F 3G1.25mm²), high temperature resistant and flame retardant, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers. H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² fused copper wire is thick and strong, will not get loosen and deformation easily. Good electrical conductivity will reduce heat and extend life span. Laboratory
